content.en:
Ahh!!!hhhhh

One after another screams came, and a Famous True Ancestor was easily killed by Ye Tian, and even the Supreme True Ancestor couldn't block a few moves.

"He is an Invincible True Ancestor, and he is the top Invincible True Ancestor!"

Someone exclaimed.

The True Ancestors of the Guangling Cold Palace were terrified, and even among the legendary forces like the Heavenly Emperor Palace, there were not many of them!

Such a true ancestor will definitely be able to become a real big man in the future, why would he attack their Heavenly Emperor Palace, Guangling Han Palace?

They are puzzled, but this is not the time to be puzzled, but to flee for their lives.

However, Ouyang Jiu'er had been waiting outside for a long time, using a blockade-type Dao technique to block the space-time turbulence.

If the true ancestors of the Guangling Cold Palace made a full move, they could naturally break the blockade, but the key was that Ye Tian was slaughtering them, where would they have time to break the blockade.

In a short time, nearly 1,000 True Ancestors fell, and even the Supreme True Ancestors also fell two.

"Who is Your Excellency, don't you know the strength of our Heavenly Emperor Palace? Our Heavenly Emperor Palace is a legendary-level force, even if you are from the Nine Heavenly Forces, once you offend our Heavenly Emperor Palace, it will be a dead end. Now we are gone, we are not to blame!"

A supreme true ancestor of the Guangling Cold Palace said.

"Idiot!"

Ye Tian scolded.

It's all this time, is it useful to beg for mercy?

He has killed so many True Ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, where is there any reason to retreat.

He has killed all these True Ancestors, it is not easy to be exposed, leave now, it will definitely be exposed!

Half an hour later.

The three thousand True Ancestors all fell, and the resources and treasures of those True Ancestors were all scraped by Ye Tian, and the corpses were thrown into the space-time turbulence, which would be washed into other areas by the space-time turbulence, and it was difficult to find.

This is undoubtedly the best way to destroy the corpse!

Subsequently, Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er entered the Guangling Cold Palace.

The Guangling Han Palace is not small, with a main palace, several auxiliary palaces, as well as a medicine garden, an attic, a martial arts training ground, a river and many other places.

Suffice it to say, there's it all here.

Ouyang Jiu'er didn't waste time in other places in the Guangling Cold Palace, and went straight to the treasure house.

For Ouyang Jiu'er, apart from the treasure trove, there were almost no good things in other places.

Soon, they came to the treasure house.

Looking at the prohibition in front of the treasure house, Ye Tian was dazzled, the prohibition here was very complicated, even no less than the prohibition outside the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

He thought it would take a long time for Ouyang Jiu'er to break the ban, but he was quickly shocked.

Bang Bang Bang !!

In just a few minutes, the ban dimmed, and in half a day, the entire ban was completely shattered.

", sure enough, she hid in the Nine Secluded Forbidden Pool at the beginning, and it didn't take hundreds of years for her to really break that prohibition. Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Quick, let's go in. Once the ban is forced, I am afraid that the Emperor of Guangling will sense that it will not be long before the Emperor of Guangling will inevitably descend here! This Guangling Cold Palace is only a small palace on the surface, and there are no treasures. But in fact, this treasure house was the real private treasure of Emperor Guangling, and there were several treasures in it that were enough to make many Dao Ancestors crazy!"

"I'll go, you just say it now!"

Ye Tian was speechless.

Immediately, the two quickly entered the treasure house and began to scrape on a large scale.

I saw that one treasure after another fell into the hands of the two of them, and there was no time to identify the types of treasures.

-----------------

Time and space turbulence, unknown depths.

In a huge world, the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm were completely blocked.

This is the real Heavenly Emperor Palace, and somewhere in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, Emperor Guangling opened his eyes.

"Someone opened the treasure house of my Guangling Han Palace? Is it the group of True Ancestors stationed there? No way, they don't have the ability to open the treasure house!"

Emperor Guangling was in a hurry.

If the ordinary treasury was stolen, he wouldn't feel distressed, but the treasure house of that palace was too valuable.

Swish!

When Emperor Guangling left his mansion, he was about to tear apart the barrier of the world and enter the turbulence of time and space.

At this time, a hand stopped Emperor Guangling.

Immediately, a voice came: "Emperor Guangling, you want to leave here? Now that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm does not allow Dao Ancestor to appear, if you forcibly descend to the outside world, you should know what the consequences will be!"

"True Martial Palace Master, I have important things to go out for. With my strength, I can temporarily resist the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and it is possible to do it without destroying the Xuanxu Ancient Realm! As long as I return quickly, the impact will not be great. Emperor Guangling said.

"Is this what I'm talking about? Don't you know that once you go out, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm will detect your existence, do you think those Dao Ancestors of the Eight or Nine Forces can't sense it? What if you go out and have an accident and get caught, what if our Heavenly Emperor Palace's plan is exposed? Although this possibility is very small, as long as there is a slight possibility, it will not be allowed. Therefore, before the time comes, no Dao Ancestor can leave the Heavenly Emperor Palace!" the True Martial Palace Lord said coldly.

"Yes!"

Emperor Guangling did not dare to refute.

Although he is an invincible Dao Ancestor, the True Martial Palace Master is a half-step domain ancestor, one of the three palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, second only to the supreme Vast Sea Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Although Emperor Guangling gave up leaving the Heavenly Emperor Palace, it did not mean that he didn't care about the treasure house of the Guangling Cold Palace.

Immediately.

He ordered the three Invincible True Ancestors under his command, dozens of Supreme True Ancestors, and tens of thousands of top True Ancestors to rush to the Guangling Cold Palace.

These True Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace didn't know the plan, and even if they were captured, it would have no effect.

The other side.

Ouyang Jiu'er and Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and they swept away the treasure house in a short period of time.

And Ouyang Jiu'er also found what she wanted.

"Brother Ye, hurry up, Emperor Guangling may not dare to come during this period, but he will definitely send a large number of True Ancestors to come. There are quite a few Supreme True Ancestors and Invincible True Ancestors under his command!"

Ouyang Jiu'er urged.

"Okay, let's go!"

Ye Tian took Ouyang Jiu'er to perform the Thousand Dao Technique Tiangang Extremely Fast, and quickly left here at the first speed in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Soon.

An army of true ancestors from the Heavenly Emperor Palace under the command of Emperor Guangling descended, and after seeing the situation in the Guangling Cold Palace, he immediately went back to report.

Emperor Guangling knew that the treasure house of Guangling Cold Palace had been stolen and the thief was nowhere to be found, so he suddenly roared around in anger, causing the curiosity of the powerful people in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

The Void Heaven True Country, the Terran Territory.

Ye Tian returned smoothly with Ouyang Jiu'er.

Immediately, the two began to divide the treasure.

"This treasure belongs to me, and the other ninety percent belongs to you!" Ouyang Jiu'er pointed to a jade box and said.

The material of this jade box was very familiar, and Ye Tian found that it was actually made of Biqing Immortal Crystal.

"What the hell is in here?"

Ye Tian was curious.

Ouyang Jiu'er unlocked the prohibition above, revealing the treasure inside, which was a piece of wood, the size of a thumb, very inconspicuous.

But Ye Tian sensed the dark forbidden power that permeated above, obviously this was a forbidden treasure.

"A small section of the root of the Forbidden Divine Tree!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "This thing can break the origin imprint, it is one of the most magical treasures in heaven and earth, I am afraid that even the vast sea ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace does not know that the Guangling Emperor has this treasure, otherwise he would have taken it away long ago!"

"What is the Forbidden Divine Tree?"

Ye Tian was like a curious baby, constantly asking.

Ouyang Jiu'er seemed to be very happy, so he had to answer all questions: "The Forbidden Divine Tree is rooted in the Dark Forbidden Domain, it is a very magical forbidden treasure, its status is similar to the World Tree of a world, so you should understand! Therefore, once a forbidden divine tree is discovered, it is enough to cause all the domain ancestors of a realm to fight. A newborn Forbidden Divine Tree was born in the Dark Forbidden Domain near the Divine Heaven Realm, a very small kind, but it caused all the Domain Ancestors to fight, and finally caused the Forbidden Divine Tree to be shattered, and most of the torsos fell into the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, which was difficult to find, and a small number of torsos were divided by the Domain Ancestors. The Dao Ancestors couldn't get a small section of the Forbidden Divine Tree at all, and even the Invincible True Ancestor didn't even want to get the torso of the Forbidden Divine Tree. "

"In addition to the fact that the Forbidden Divine Tree can break the Origin Imprint, it also has an amazing effect, that is, once any part of the Forbidden Divine Tree is refined, you can completely master the power of the Dark Taboo, even the Dao Ancestor can master the power of the Dark Taboo. Therefore, any Dao Ancestor who obtains it can step into the ranks of the strongest Dao Ancestors!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"That's awesome!"

Ye Tian was shocked.
